evidence.q1: Sections numbered 1 to 13 sequentially, no internal cross-references to resolve.
evidence.q2: "Confidential Information" means information disclosed... (defined in §1); "Recipient may use Confidential Information" (consistent usage in §2).
evidence.q3: "within ninety days" (§8) and "for two years" (§9) provide precise time periods.
evidence.q4: "Recipient may use Confidential Information for the Purpose, including to evaluate potential product and commercial opportunities arising from the parties' discussions." (modern register, no archaic diction).
evidence.q5: "All Confidential Information remains the property of Discloser." (grammatically intact, no contradiction).
evidence.q6: Consistent register: "Recipient may use Confidential Information..." (§2) and "Recipient will protect Confidential Information using the same degree of care..." (§4).
